# AMX Signs

> Premium handcrafted LED neon signs in India. High-fidelity LED neon art delivered with speed and surgical precision. Fits gaming setups, modern home decor, garages, cafes, and commercial branding. 

## About the Brand
AMX Signs manufactures high-efficiency 12V low-voltage LED neon signs that stay completely cool to the touch and operate silently (no heat, no hum). Every sign includes a complete mounting kit, an On/Off power adapter, and a 1-year official warranty. We offer free shipping across India with a 3–8 day delivery timeline.

---

## Core Pages
- [Home Page](https://www.amxsigns.com/): Storefront hero, trending products, and general company information.
- [Customizer](https://www.amxsigns.com/customizer): Dynamic web app to design, preview, and order custom text neon signs with real-time size and color selection.
- [Business Catalog](https://www.amxsigns.com/business): Premium custom logo design and commercial signage inquiry pipeline for cafes, gyms, offices, and events.
- [Blog Guide](https://www.amxsigns.com/blog): Styling tutorials, unboxing instructions, and interior design inspiration guides.

---

## Shop & Collections
- [All Collections](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections): Browse the full catalog of handcrafted neon signs.
- [Cars Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/cars): Precision-cut LED silhouettes of iconic vehicles (BMW, Porsche, Ferrari, F1 circuit maps).
- [Gaming Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/gaming): Gaming controller silhouettes, anime designs, and setup lighting.
- [Anime Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/anime): High-fidelity anime icons (Sharingans, Akatsuki clouds, One Piece flags).
- [Aesthetic Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/aesthetic): Minimalist designs, typography quotes, and mood lighting.
- [Love Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/love): Romance themes, hearts, and personalized couple gifting neons.
- [Wings Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/wings): Angel wings and statement wall backdrops.
- [Cafe Collection](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/cafe): Hospitality signs, coffee cups, and bar branding.
- [Under ₹4000](https://www.amxsigns.com/collections/under-4000): Budget-friendly neon gift ideas.

---

## Programmatic Cities Directory
Detailed local landers showing custom delivery estimates, local landmarks, and popular styles for major Indian metros:
- [Mumbai](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/mumbai) (3-5 day delivery, serving Bandra, Andheri, Powai, Thane)
- [Delhi](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/delhi) (3-5 day delivery, serving Connaught Place, Dwarka, Pitampura)
- [Bangalore](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/bangalore) (4-6 day delivery, serving Koramangala, Indiranagar, Whitefield)
- [Hyderabad](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/hyderabad) (4-6 day delivery, serving Banjara Hills, Gachibowli, Jubilee Hills)
- [Chennai](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/chennai) (4-6 day delivery, serving Anna Nagar, T. Nagar, Adyar)
- [Pune](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/pune) (3-5 day delivery, serving Koregaon Park, Kharadi, Hinjewadi)
- [Ahmedabad](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/ahmedabad) (4-6 day delivery, serving SG Highway, Navrangpura)
- [Kolkata](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/kolkata) (5-7 day delivery, serving Salt Lake, New Town, Park Street)
- [Gurgaon](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/gurgaon) (3-5 day delivery, serving DLF Cyber City, Golf Course Road)
- [Noida](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/noida) (3-5 day delivery, serving Sector 18, Expressway)
- [Jaipur](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/jaipur) (4-6 day delivery, serving C-Scheme, Malviya Nagar)
- [Chandigarh](https://www.amxsigns.com/locations/chandigarh) (4-6 day delivery, serving Sector 17, Mohali)

## Key Bestsellers
- [Obito Sharingan Eye](https://www.amxsigns.com/products/obito-mangekyo-sharingan-neon-eye): Detailed Uchiha Sharingan red glow.
- [One Piece Straw Hat Pirates](https://www.amxsigns.com/products/one-piece-straw-hat-pirates-neon): Iconic Luffy pirate crew logo.
- [Silverstone Circuit Map](https://www.amxsigns.com/products/silverstone-f1-circuit-track-outline): Formula 1 UK racetrack map.
- [D.Va Bunny](https://www.amxsigns.com/products/d-va-bunny-overwatch-gaming-neon): Overwatch D.Va symbol.
- [BMW M4 Silhouette](https://www.amxsigns.com/products/bmw-m4-f82-white-profile-neon): Sleek sports car side profile.
- [Dream Big Neon Sign](https://www.amxsigns.com/products/dream-big-inspirational-office-neon): Motivational typography wall light.

## Support & Policy Endpoints
- [Contact Help Center](https://www.amxsigns.com/contact): Support email, WhatsApp links, and contact form.
- [Shipping & Logistics](https://www.amxsigns.com/shipping): Detailed logistics operations and timelines.
- [Refunds & Returns](https://www.amxsigns.com/refunds): 7-day hassle-free replacement policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.amxsigns.com/terms): General e-commerce transaction terms.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.amxsigns.com/privacy): Data safety and cookie usage disclosure.
